title: Lugano, Ticino — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Lugano, Ticino: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Lugano is a city in Ticino with a population of 63,000. The largest city in Italian-speaking Switzerland, set on Lake Lugano with Mediterranean flair, a vibrant financial center, and stunning mountain views.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
